title: Boeing Invests USD 13M in Two SAF Projects in North America
content: US aircraft maker Boeing Co will invest CAD 17.48 million (USD 12.6m/EUR 11.2m) to promote sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) production in Canada, supporting Project Avance in Port Cartier, Quebec, and New York-based carbon dioxide (CO2) utilisation company Dimensional Energy. Project Avance, a joint venture between Alder Renewables and Bioenergie AE Cote-Nord, will receive CAD 10 million.
author: Analysts Account
